roles.name: Godfather
roles.short_description: Chooses the Mafia's target each night.
roles.description:
Chooses the Mafia's target each night. 
 Use _/kill player-name_ in this DM with the bot to kill your chosen player. 
 A seperate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member. 
 During the day you can use _/vote player-name_ in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day.
 You win when there are more mob than other factions

roles.name: Mob Goon
roles.short_description: A member of the Mafia.
roles.description:
A member of the Mafia.
 A seperate message will be sent with the identity of the other mob member.
 You will be promoted to Mob Godfather if the Mob Godfather dies.
 During the day you can use _/vote player-name_ in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day.
 You win when there are more mob than other factions

roles.name: Town Cop
roles.short_description: Can investigates one player each night to learn their alignment.
roles.description:
You are town alligned and can investigates one player each night to learn their alignment.
 Use _/investigate player-name_ during the night phase in this DM with the bot to investigate your chosen player.
 Results will be sent as soon as day phase starts. Use them wisely.
 During the day you can use _/vote player-name_ in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day.
 You win when all mob and the SK are dead

roles.name: Town Doctor
roles.short_description: Can heal one player each night
roles.description:
You are town alligned and can protect one player each night from being killed.
 Use _/heal player-name_ during the night phase in this DM with the bot to heal your chosen player.
 During the day you can use _/vote player-name_ in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day.
 You win when all mob and the SK are dead

roles.name: Plain Townie
roles.short_description: Normal member of town
roles.description:
A regular member of the town.
 During the day you can use _/vote player-name_ in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day.
 You win when all mob and the SK are dead

roles.name: Town Role Blocker
roles.short_description: Prevents one player from performing their night action.
roles.description: You are town aligned and can prevent one player from performing their night action each night. Use `/block player-name` during the night phase in this DM with the bot to block your chosen player. During the day you can use `/vote player-name` in the voting channel to cast your vote on who should be lynched for that day. You win when all Mafia and the SK are dead.
